rows.title: Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting In Respect Of QIP 7m ago Manorama Industries opened QIP on June 29, 2026; floor price set at ₹1,547.18 per share.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release 49m ago SIS announces proposed fifth buyback of up to ₹120 crore at up to ₹478.50 per share.
Updates 55m ago BNG Investment LLC completed SSSPA on 29 June 2026; four erstwhile promoters reclassified to public.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Change in Directorate 1h ago Atul Gupta appointed CMD of Engineers India, effective 29 June 2026 till superannuation on 30 Sep 2029.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Change in Directorate 1h ago HDFC Bank appoints Rajiv Kumar as independent director from June 30, 2026; RBI approval pending for part-time chairman.
Intimation Pursuant To Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosures Requirements) Regulations, 2015 1h ago Classic Filaments acquired 73.75% of Solven Power Systems on 29 June 2026.
Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On June 29Th, 2026 2h ago Board approved three-year IP agreement with Magnum IP: 0% royalty until 31 March 2027, then 1% through FY29.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order 2h ago Received Rs 19.97 crore domestic transformer order for Gadag wind project, to execute within 5 months.
Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue 2h ago Board approved indemnity claims of Rs. 7.28 crore, Rs. 48.8 lakh and Rs. 2.64 crore; received ROFO for six SPVs.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Diversification / Disinvestment 2h ago Completed sale of 99.999% BACC stake on June 29, 2026; received INR 28.23 crore initial consideration.

Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Of The Company Held On June 29, 2026 2h ago Board approved IPO proceeds variation of ₹1000.16 million, subject to shareholder postal ballot approval.
Outcome of Board Meeting 2h ago Board approved DLOF for rights issue up to ₹23.14 crore on June 29, 2026.

Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order 2h ago RailTel secured Rs. 27.06 crore order from Goa Labour Welfare Board for an online portal, to execute by 23-Aug-26.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition 2h ago IKS Inc to invest up to USD 15 million in WWMG MSO; first USD 3 million by July 3, 2026.
Amendment to AOA/MOA 2h ago Board approved 24 Jul 2026 AGM, authorised capital rise to Rs61 crore, and Sukhdev Singh as CMD.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Change in Management 2h ago Homre approved board changes on June 29, 2026: new Chairperson, Managing Director, appointments, and resignation.
Change in Management 2h ago Board approved AGM notice, Rs 61 crore authorised capital, new textile objects, and new CMD appointment.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition 2h ago POWERGRID acquired Kakinada I Transmission Limited on 29.06.2026 for about Rs. 20.50 crore.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition 2h ago Board approved 50% stake acquisition in Celloraa Energy for Rs. 160 crore; completion expected within 12 months.

Outcome of Board Meeting 3h ago Board approved AGM for 24 July 2026, ₹61 crore authorised capital, new textile business object, and CMD changes.
